title: Garlicky Crumbly Turkish Parma Ham Flatbread
description: A savory, low-carb Turkish flatbread filled with garlicky parma ham and crumbly texture, perfect for midnight cravings. This dish is a delicious combination of Turkish and Italian flavors.
instructions: Roll out the Turkish flatbread to a thickness of about 1/4 inch.
In a pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat and sauté the minced garlic until fragrant.
Add the thinly sliced parma ham to the pan and cook until lightly browned.
Sprinkle the crumbly feta cheese over the flatbread, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the edges.
Add the cooked parma ham and garlic mixture on top of the feta cheese.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Bake the flatbread in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
Slice into wedges and serve hot.
